title: Napatyre LED Torch Rechargeable Work Light,1000 Lumens Portable Emergency Inspection Lamp with Magnetic Base,120° Rotate 3 Modes Magnetic Work Light for Camping Car Repair Emergency (2 Pack)
features: 【DURABLE MATERIAL】Our LED work light is made of hard rubber, anti-sweat and anti-slip, the head is made of aluminum which dissipates the heat effectively, prolonging the life of the lamp.
【3 MODES & 120° ROTATION】Designed with three light modes: COB low mode, COB high mode and LED dome light. Its head can 120° rotating to provide multi-angle illumination.
【STRONG MAGNETIC BASE】Featuring a strong magnet base, the inspection light can be attached to your car body and other metal surfaces, freeing your hands.

【RECHARGEABLE WORK LIGHT】Powered by a built-in 4000mAh battery,this rechargeable work light can be fully charged within 4.5 hours,and work for 3.5-13 hours.The indicate light can show the charging or full charging.
【WIDELY USED】Great for the home lighting, outdoor, workshop, car repair, camping light, hunting, hiking, fishing, inspection and emergency light use.
description: Product Description Specifications: Brightness: 1000 Lumen Color Temperature: 6500K Voltage: 3.7V Power: 10W Battery: Lithium Battery, 4000mAh Charging Time: About 4.5 Hours Working Time: About 3.5-13 Hours Package Included: 1 x Inspection Lamp 1 x USB Charging Cable Napatyre Rechargeable LED Work Light Napatyre LED work light produces up to 1000LM high brightness to flood your working area. 3 lighting modes choice meets your needs for different working scenes. 120 degree rotate design provides multi-angle illumination. It's perfect for indoor and outdoor. An ideal choice for hiking, camping, fishing, car repairing, hunting, workshop, garages, warehouses, storage and etc. It can also be used as emergency lights during power outage. 1000-Lumen Ultra Bright 120° Rotate Design 4000mAh Rechargeable Battery Strong Magnetic Base Battery Level Indicator One-handed Control Why Choose Our Rechargeable LED Work Light? 120° Rotate Design The magnetic work light has unique 120 degree rotate design provide multi-angle illumination. Strong Magnetic Base The bottom of the work light is magnetic. When you are inconvenient to hold it with your hands, you can use magnetic force to hold it. USB Rechargeable With a built-in 4000mAh rechargeable battery, the inspecton light can be recharged, saving the cost of replacing batteries.

specifications_table.Special features: ‎120° Rotate, USB Rechargeable, Waterproof, Strong Magnetic Base
